name: Visionbank
description_short: Vision Bank is a community-focused bank offering personal and small business banking with competitive rates, online and in-person services, and a 2.00% APY on premium checking accounts.
description_long: Vision Bank positions itself as a non-traditional bank founded by experienced entrepreneurs, professionals, and investors who understand business ownership and personal financial goals. The bank emphasizes combining online convenience with personal care, differentiating itself from larger institutional competitors by claiming to understand what it means to have a vision and bring it to life. They serve both personal banking customers and small business owners through their dual-focus service model. The bank operates through a hybrid model offering digital banking capabilities alongside traditional in-person service, with a planned transition to an improved digital platform announced for September 18th. Vision Bank appears to be a regional or community bank that prioritizes relationship banking while maintaining modern technology infrastructure. Their positioning suggests they cater to entrepreneurs and business-minded individuals rather than purely consumer-focused depositors. However, based on the website content provided, specific details about their full product range, branch locations, insurance protections, and comparative advantages remain limited, requiring direct contact via their main number (952-920-8400) for comprehensive product information. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Small business banking and business account solutions
pros: 2.00% APY on Premium Checking Accounts, competitive rate for checking products
Service-fee-free ATM access through MoneyPass ATM network
Hybrid banking model combining online convenience with personal customer service
Founded by and operated by entrepreneurs and professionals who understand small business needs
Dedicated small business banking team available to discuss solutions
Digital and online forms available for transfers and account changes
In-person and online banking options for customer convenience
cons: Limited information on website about full product suite, CD rates, savings account options, or other banking products
No mention of mobile app features, mobile banking capabilities, or digital security features
Sparse details on small business loan products, terms, or requirements despite marketing to business customers

contact.address: 3059 Joppa Ave S, Saint Louis Park, MN 55416

best_for: Small business owners and entrepreneurs seeking personalized banking relationships
Personal banking customers seeking competitive checking account rates with relationship-based service
Individuals who prefer hybrid banking with both digital and in-person banking options
diagnosis: Vision Bank is best for small business owners and entrepreneurs seeking a banking partner that understands business goals, as well as personal customers prioritizing competitive checking rates with human service. The main caveat is that the website provides limited detail on the full range of products, terms, and services—potential customers should call 952-920-8400 to understand complete offerings, loan products, and whether Vision Bank has branches or ATMs in their area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 3059 Joppa Ave S, Saint Louis Park, MN 55416
